---
title: Rôti de bœuf braisé

categories:
  - Boeuf
  - Plat principal
  - Braisé
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">
<div class="recipe-toolbar-main">
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Froti-de-boeuf-braise.yaml" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">✏️ Modifier</a>
<a href="../ajouter_recette/?yaml=%2Frecettes%2Frepas%2Froti-de-boeuf-braise.yaml&quick=comment" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">💬 + Commentaire</a>
</div>
<div class="recipe-toolbar-actions">
<button id="recipe-cart-toggle" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success btn-sm">🛒 Mettre au panier</button>
<button id="recipe-reading-mode" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">🍳 Mode cuisine</button>
</div>
</div>
<div class="recipe-facts-grid"><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Source</span><strong><a href="https://www.cookwithcampbells.ca/fr/recipe/roti-de-boeuf-braise/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">cookwithcampbells.ca</a></strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Se congèle</span><strong>Oui</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps préparation</span><strong>10 min</strong></div><div class="recipe-fact"><span>Temps cuisson</span><strong>180 min</strong></div></div>

```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/repas/roti-de-boeuf-braise.qmd","title":"Rôti de bœuf braisé","url":"/recettes/repas/roti-de-boeuf-braise.qmd","portions_base":8,"portions_target":8,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium","uni":"ml","qte":625,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux","uni":"ml","qte":750,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux","uni":"","qte":2,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"carottes miniatures","uni":"ml","qte":250,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)","uni":"branches","qte":2,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"oignon coupé en dés","uni":"","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"ail émincées","uni":"gousses","qte":4,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"sauce Worcestershire","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"feuilles de thym frais","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"pâte de tomate","uni":"c. à thé","qte":2,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"feuille de laurier","uni":"feuille","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"rôti de boeuf, sans l’os","uni":"g","qte":1500,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"fécule de maïs","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-meta-badges"><span class="recipe-meta-badge">Difficulté: Facile</span><span class="recipe-meta-badge">Coût: $$</span></div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="8" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 8</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="recipe-nutrition-section">
<h2>Valeurs nutritives</h2>
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>6 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>0 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>1,4 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>0 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 8.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 2.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="45.135" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">45 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="45.135" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">6 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.02106" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.02106" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.00405" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.00405" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.000729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.000729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="10.95405" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">11 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="10.95405" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1,4 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.83549" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">1,8 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.83549" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fibres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.0729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,1 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.0729" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="180.069" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">180 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="180.069" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">23 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="146.643" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">147 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="146.643" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">18 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="19.743" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">20 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="19.743" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">2 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.00797" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">1 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.00797" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,1 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Magnésium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.622" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">3 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.622" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Zinc</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.03963" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.03963" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.3183" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,3 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.3183" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="2.379" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">2,4 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="2.379" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">0,3 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine B12</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine A (EAR)</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.915" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">1 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0.915" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="0" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (11)</summary><ul><li><code>Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>carottes miniatures</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>oignon coupé en dés</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>ail émincées</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>feuilles de thym frais</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>pâte de tomate</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>feuille de laurier</code> (unite_non_supportee)</li><li><code>rôti de boeuf, sans l’os</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li></ul></details></details></div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

## Ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-grocery-actions">
<button id="copy-grocery-list" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">📋 Générer la liste d'épicerie</button>
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Préparation principale

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="625" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="625">625</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="750" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="750">750</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux" data-ingredient-unit="" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="carottes miniatures" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">carottes miniatures</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)" data-ingredient-unit="branches" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">branches</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="oignon coupé en dés" data-ingredient-unit="" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">oignon coupé en dés</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="ail émincées" data-ingredient-unit="gousses" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="4">4</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">gousses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">ail émincées</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="sauce Worcestershire" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">sauce Worcestershire</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="feuilles de thym frais" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">feuilles de thym frais</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="pâte de tomate" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="10" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">pâte de tomate</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="feuille de laurier" data-ingredient-unit="feuille" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">feuille</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">feuille de laurier</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="rôti de boeuf, sans l’os" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="1500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1500">1500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rôti de boeuf, sans l’os</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="fécule de maïs" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="8.115" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">fécule de maïs</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Conseil (Facultatif)

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
</ul>
```

### Suggestion de service

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Préparation principale

- Cocotte
- Faitout
- Plat de service

### Conseil (Facultatif)

- Poêle

### Suggestion de service


## Préparation

### Préparation principale

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="625" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="625">625</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Bouillon de Boeuf avec du Vin Rouge avec 30 % moins de sodium</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="750" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="750">750</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">petites pommes de terre, coupées en deux</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux" data-ingredient-unit="" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">champignons creminis tranchés, coupés en deux</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="carottes miniatures" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">carottes miniatures</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)" data-ingredient-unit="branches" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">branches</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">branches de céleri, coupées en morceaux de 2,5 cm (1 po)</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="oignon coupé en dés" data-ingredient-unit="" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">oignon coupé en dés</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="ail émincées" data-ingredient-unit="gousses" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="4">4</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">gousses</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">ail émincées</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="sauce Worcestershire" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">sauce Worcestershire</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="feuilles de thym frais" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">feuilles de thym frais</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="pâte de tomate" data-ingredient-unit="c. à thé" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="10" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à thé" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="2">2</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à thé</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">pâte de tomate</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="feuille de laurier" data-ingredient-unit="feuille" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">feuille</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">feuille de laurier</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans une cocotte ou un faitout épais fermé par un couvercle hermétique, mélanger le bouillon, les pommes de terre, les champignons, les carottes, le céleri, l’oignon, l’ail, la sauce Worcestershire, le thym, la pâte de tomate et la feuille de laurier. Mijoter à feu moyen.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="rôti de boeuf, sans l’os" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="1500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1500">1500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">rôti de boeuf, sans l’os</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Saler et poivrer le rôti de tous les côtés, au goût. Plonger dans la sauce et les légumes qui mijotent. Réduire le feu, couvrir et mijoter de 2 heures et demie à 3 heures et demie ou jusqu’à ce que le bœuf soit tendre et se défasse à la fourchette.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="7200">⏱️ 2 h</button><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="10800">⏱️ 3 h</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="fécule de maïs" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="1" data-base-mass-g="8.115" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">fécule de maïs</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Transférer le rôti de bœuf et les légumes dans un plat de service. Incorporer le mélange de fécule de maïs dans le liquide de cuisson qui mijote. Cuire en remuant jusqu’à l’obtention d’une texture plus épaisse, environ une minute. Servir avec le rôti de bœuf et les légumes.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Conseil (Facultatif)

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Pour plus de saveur et une couleur plus riche, saisir le rôti de bœuf entier avec 1 c. à soupe d’huile de canola dans une poêle à feu moyen-vif avant de l’ajouter aux autres ingrédients dans le faitout.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Suggestion de service

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Servir avec une salade ou un pain croûté pour imbiber la délicieuse sauce.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=8;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;let mode=(localStorage.getItem(modeKey)==='mass')?'mass':'volume';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const isKitchenUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='tasse'||n==='t'||n==='c a soupe'||n==='cuillere a soupe'||n==='cuilleres a soupe'||n==='c a table'||n==='c s'||n==='c.s.'||n==='c a the'||n==='cuillere a the'||n==='cuilleres a the'||n==='c t'||n==='c.t.';};const chooseKitchenUnit=(volumeMl,explicit)=>{if(isKitchenUnit(explicit)) return explicit; if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return 'c. à thé'; if(volumeMl>=125) return 'tasse'; if(volumeMl>=7.5) return 'c. à soupe'; return 'c. à thé';};const chooseImperialMassUnit=(massG,explicit)=>{const e=normalize(explicit); if(e==='once'||e==='onces'||e==='oz') return 'onces'; if(e==='lb'||e==='lbs') return 'lbs'; if(!Number.isFinite(massG)) return 'lbs'; return massG<453.59237?'onces':'lbs';};const setDerived=(label,qNode,uNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); if(!qNode||!label) return false; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitMass=li.dataset.explicitMass==='1'; const explicitVolume=li.dataset.explicitVolume==='1'; const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const explicitUnitVolume=li.dataset.explicitUnitVolume||'ml'; let qty=NaN; let unit=''; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?chooseImperialMassUnit(baseMass*ratio,explicitUnitMass):'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} qNode.textContent=format(qty); if(uNode){uNode.textContent=unit;} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', unit); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(label,qNode,uNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs');};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```
